mapper.insert: INSERT INTO rooms ( room_id, room_type, capacity, price_per_night, description, amenities, status ) VALUES ( #{roomId}, #{roomType}, #{capacity}, #{pricePerNight}, #{description}, #{amenities}, #{status} )
mapper.select: SELECT id, room_id AS roomId, room_type AS roomType, capacity, price_per_night AS pricePerNight, description, amenities, status, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM rooms WHERE room_id = #{roomId}
